top_signals.title: Oil Extends Decline After Trump Says US Nearing Deal With Iran
top_signals.summary: Oil extended declines after President Donald Trump said a peace deal with Iran could be signed as soon as the weekend following two days of US military strikes that cast doubt over progress to end the war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SpaceX IPO marks the end of the no-brainer benchmark index trade
top_signals.summary: Investors do not need big benchmarks to get what they want
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Freimane on on SpaceX, Renewables, Energy Opportunities
top_signals.summary: Norrsken VC General Partner Agate Freimane speaks with Bloomberg's Tom Mackenzie from the Founders Forum in Oxfordshire, UK. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Fundamental CEO on Launching First Product
top_signals.summary: Fundamental CEO and Co-Founder Jeremy Fraenkel speaks with Bloomberg's Tom Mackenzie from the Founders Forum in Oxfordshire, UK. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Can Europe build a new fighter jet after Germany scraps joint venture?
